name: Chiken Pot Pie-
recipeInstructions:
(I use mushroom or chicken)
1. Mix all ingredients in a bowl. Add a little more milk to make gravy.
2. Pour into pie crust.
3. Freeze uncooked. You can also place on top pie crust.
4. Prick with fork to allow steam vents.
5. To cook: 350 degrees for 2 hours if baked directly from the freezer. 1 hour to bake if thawed.
6. This dish is easy to make and my family loves it. It's simple to prepare 3 or 4 at a time.
7. We usually serve this over rice.
